diagrams.title: FST for Basic Plural Rule (e.g., fox -> foxes)

visuals.title: FST for Basic Plural Rule (e.g., fox -> foxes)
visuals.svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E3F2FD"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#BBDEFB"/>
    </linearGradient>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="350" fill="url(#bg)" rx="12"/>
  <text x="210" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0">Morphological Parsing</text>

  <!-- Input Word -->
  <rect x="160" y="60" width="100" height="40" fill="#1565C0" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="85" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Input Word
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Arrow to Parser -->
  <path d="M210,100 L210,130" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>

  <!-- Morphological Parser -->
  <rect x="135" y="130" width="150" height="50" fill="#2196F3" rx="7" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="160" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="12" fill="white" font-weight="bold" opacity="0">
    Morphological Parser
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Arrows to Outputs -->
  <path d="M135,155 L95,190" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  <path d="M285,155 L325,190" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>

  <!-- Root/Stem -->
  <rect x="55" y="190" width="80" height="40" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="95" y="215" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Root/Stem
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Affixes -->
  <rect x="285" y="190" width="80" height="40" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="325" y="215" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Affixes
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Arrow to Analysis -->
  <path d="M210,180 L210,240" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>

  <!-- Morphological Analysis -->
  <rect x="110" y="240" width="200" height="50" fill="#2196F3" rx="7" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="270" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="12" fill="white" font-weight="bold" opacity="0">
    Morphological Analysis
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Arrowhead marker definition -->
  <defs>
    <marker id="arrowhead" markerWidth="10" markerHeight="7" refX="9" refY="3.5" orient="auto">
      <polygon points="0 0, 10 3.5, 0 7" fill="#1565C0"/>
    </marker>
  </defs>
</svg>
